metadata.title: Ahmed Samra Tennis
metadata.description: Professional training programs, continuous progress tracking, and performance reviews to help you reach your best level.

hero.heading: Player Portal
hero.subheading: All Your Tennis Reports in One Place
hero.description: Enter your player code to access match reports, performance analysis, strengths, improvement areas, development plans, and training videos.

about.heading: About Ahmed Samra
story: Ahmed Samra is a tennis coach focused on long-term player development through performance analysis and structured coaching.
He combines match analysis, video review, and personalized development plans to help every player improve with confidence.

roles.title: Professional Tennis Coach
roles.description: Designs structured programs that turn daily practice into measurable progress.

roles.title: Competitive Tennis Player
roles.description: Coaches from lived match experience, with a practical eye for pressure, timing, and decision-making.

roles.title: Engineer
roles.description: Applies analytical thinking to movement, performance patterns, and player development.

roles.title: Mentor
roles.description: Guides players with discipline, patience, and a standard that builds lasting confidence.

roles.title: Founder
roles.description: Built Ahmed Samra Tennis as a focused training environment for serious, modern player growth.

achievements.heading: Credibility measured by player growth, not trophies alone.
achievements.introduction: Ahmed Samra's work is built on sustained court experience, a competitive playing background, and a training method centered on long-term development. The result is a calm, precise training experience that gives every player a clear path toward confident improvement.

cards.title: Sustained tennis experience
cards.description: Experience shaped by training, playing, and studying the details of movement, timing, and decision-making.

cards.title: Structured player development
cards.description: Programs connect every session to a clear goal, from technical foundations to realistic match situations.

cards.title: Match-tested perspective
cards.description: A practical understanding of rhythm, pressure, mental stability, and better choices under stress.

cards.title: Building young players correctly
cards.description: Focus on movement fundamentals, discipline, confidence, and learning capacity before rushing results.

cards.title: Sustainable progress philosophy
cards.description: Ahmed believes strong players are built through measurement, patience, intelligent repetition, and honest review.

services.heading: Training programs for players who want clear, confident progress.
services.introduction: Each service is built around a precise goal: improving level, building foundations, preparing for competition, and reading performance with clarity. A refined training experience shaped by discipline, detail, and calm follow-up.

cards.title: Individual Training
cards.description: Focused technical and tactical development tailored to the player's needs, level, and most important areas for improvement.

cards.title: Junior Training
cards.description: Building the player correctly from the foundation, with attention to movement, control, discipline, and love for the game.

cards.title: Tournament Preparation
cards.description: Preparing players for competition through a clear training plan that supports season management and match pressure.

cards.title: Video Analysis
cards.description: Reviewing performance to identify strengths and weaknesses, revealing the small details that matter on court.

cards.title: Continuous Follow-Up
cards.description: Creating a training plan and tracking player development regularly to support steady progress through clear feedback.

gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments from training, competition and player development.

testimonials.heading: Trust built through the quality of training, not words alone.
testimonials.introduction: Professional placeholder feedback shaped around what players and parents value most: structured coaching, growing confidence, clear technical improvement, and discipline that supports long-term development.

cards.author: Parent
cards.quote: The strongest part of the experience is the clarity of the plan. The player understands what to train, why it matters, and how each step builds confidence and discipline.

cards.author: Junior Player
cards.quote: Training helped me understand my mistakes in a simple way. I feel more confident with my shots and more focused during practice and matches.

cards.author: Competitive Player
cards.quote: The attention to technical and tactical details made a real difference. Every session has a clear goal, and every review helps me make better decisions on court.

cards.author: Parent
cards.quote: Progress shows not only in technique, but also in discipline, confidence, and the way the player approaches training and competition.

playerPortal.heading: Everything About Your Tennis Journey
playerPortal.introduction: The Player Portal brings together your reports, performance analysis, strengths, improvement areas, training plans, and videos in one place.

features.title: Progress Tracking
features.description: A structured view of technical, physical, and mental development across the training journey.

features.title: Training Schedule
features.description: Clear organization for session times and preparation notes before each training day.

features.title: Match Results
features.description: A place to record match results and key observations that explain competitive performance.

features.title: Performance Video Uploads
features.description: A space for training and match clips so performance details can be reviewed and analyzed.

features.title: Coach Notes
features.description: Focused notes that help the player understand what to keep, adjust, and improve.

features.title: Development Plan
features.description: A clear training plan that connects daily goals with long-term improvement on court.

mockup.label: Dashboard
mockup.title: Player progress overview
mockup.chartDescription: A structured view that helps players connect training work with ongoing review.
mockup.sessionText: Technical and tactical training with a weekly goal review.

cta.description: The Player Portal will launch in a later phase to make follow-up and training organization easier.

cta.heading: Book your training now
cta.description: Choose the contact method that works best for you, and the next step will be arranged clearly and calmly to begin a professional training experience on court.

contact.heading: Start with a clear step toward a better level.
contact.introduction: For bookings or questions about training programs, use the direct contact details or leave a message and you will be guided toward the most suitable training path.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Share your training goal or question

footer.description: Professional tennis coaching focused on technical foundations, discipline, confidence, and long-term player development.

player.title: Player Reports
player.subtitle: Enter your Player ID to view your reports.
